content:
# Scenario Manifest — MSPM33C321A Derivative MCU
# Design:   mspm33c321a_derivative  (mspm33c321a_deriv)
# Generated: 2026-05-29
# Spec refs: docs/requirements.md, docs/specifications.md,
#            docs/padframe_requirements.md, config/soc_config.yaml
#
# Manifest schema
# ───────────────
# scenarios      : list of scenario records
#   name         : scenario name (matches YAML filename without .yaml)
#   file         : relative path from project root to scenario YAML
#   checklist_ids: list of checklist item IDs covered by this scenario
#   test_names   : list of test function names exercised
#   priority     : highest-priority checklist item in this scenario
#   domain       : primary domain tag
#
# coverage_map   : flat list of {checklist_id, scenario_name} pairs
#   (every checklist item appears exactly once)
# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SCENARIOS
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
scenarios:

  - name: scenario_sys_reset_clock
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_sys_reset_clock.yaml
    domain: SYS
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - SYS-01
      - SYS-02
      - SYS-03
      - SYS-04
      - SYS-05
    test_names:
      - test_sys_por_state
      - test_sys_external_reset
      - test_sys_sw_reset
      - test_sys_clock_freq
      - test_sys_wwdt_reset_path

  - name: scenario_xip_flash
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_xip_flash.yaml
    domain: XIP
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - XIP-01
      - XIP-02
      - XIP-03
      - XIP-04
    test_names:
      - test_xip_boot_fetch
      - test_xip_reg_smoke
      - test_xip_data_integrity
      - test_xip_addr_boundary

  - name: scenario_sram_memory
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_sram_memory.yaml
    domain: MEM
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - MEM-01
      - MEM-02
      - MEM-03
      - MEM-04
    test_names:
      - test_mem_base_rw
      - test_mem_addr_walk
      - test_mem_data_integrity
      - test_mem_cpu_dma_concurrent

  - name: scenario_gpio_basic
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_gpio_basic.yaml
    domain: GPIO
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - GPIO-01
      - GPIO-02
      - GPIO-03
      - GPIO-04
      - GPIO-05
      - GPIO-06
      - GPIO-07
    test_names:
      - test_gpio_porta_output
      - test_gpio_porta_input
      - test_gpio_portb_output
      - test_gpio_portb_input
      - test_gpio_portc_output
      - test_gpio_portc_input
      - test_gpio_reset_state

  - name: scenario_gpio_af_irq
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_gpio_af_irq.yaml
    domain: GPIO
    priority: P1
    checklist_ids:
      - GPIO-08
      - GPIO-09
      - IRQ-05
    test_names:
      - test_gpio_af_pinmux
      - test_gpio_edge_irq
      - test_irq_gpio_edge

  - name: scenario_uart_loopback
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_uart_loopback.yaml

    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - UART-01
      - UART-02
      - UART-03
      - UART-04
    test_names:
      - test_uart0_loopback_115200
      - test_uart1_loopback_115200
      - test_uart2_loopback_115200
      - test_uart3_loopback_115200

  - name: scenario_uart_advanced

      - UART-07
      - UART-08
    test_names:

  - name: scenario_spi_transfer

      - SPI-04
      - SPI-05
    test_names:

  - name: scenario_i2c_transfer

      - I2C-01
      - I2C-02
      - I2C-03
      - I2C-04
      - I2C-05
      - I2C-06
      - I2C-07
      - I2C-08
    test_names:
      - test_i2c0_7bit_write
      - test_i2c0_7bit_read
      - test_i2c1_transfer
      - test_i2c2_transfer

      - TMR-04
      - TMR-05

      - PWM-03
      - PWM-04

      - test_pwm_reg_smoke

  - name: scenario_dma_transfer

    domain: DMA
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:

      - DMA-02

      - DMA-06

  - name: scenario_crc_kat

  - name: scenario_aes_kat

    priority: P0

      - AES-02
      - AES-03

      - test_aes128_ecb_decrypt_kat

  - name: scenario_wwdt_window
    file: verification/scenarios/scenario_wwdt_window.yaml
    domain: WWDT
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:
      - WWDT-01
      - WWDT-02
      - WWDT-03

  - name: scenario_rtc_calendar

    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:

      - RTC-02
      - RTC-03
      - RTC-04
      - RTC-05
    test_names:
      - test_rtc_calendar_set_read
      - test_rtc_time_advance
      - test_rtc_alarm_a
      - test_rtc_alarm_b

  - name: scenario_systick_timer

    domain: SYSTICK
    priority: P0
    checklist_ids:

      - SYSTICK-02
      - SYSTICK-03

  - name: scenario_irq_fabric

    domain: IRQ

    checklist_ids:

  - name: scenario_swd_debug

# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# METADATA
# ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
metadata:
  design: mspm33c321a_derivative
  design_alias: mspm33c321a_deriv
  generated: "2026-05-29"
  total_checklist_items: 97
  total_scenarios: 21
  coverage_gaps: 0
  priority_breakdown:
    P0: 63
    P1: 32
    P2: 3
  derivative_delta_items:
    - I2C-04    # I2C2 new instance (R-006)
    - I2C-08    # Smoke covers all 3 I2C instances including new I2C2
  out_of_scope:
    - ADC_12BIT_SAR    # mixed-signal block; outside NC_SOCGEN RTL
    - MCAN_CAN_FD      # no NC_CAN IP in framework
    - TRNG             # no NC_TRNG IP in framework
    - GLS_NETLIST_SIM  # gate-level simulation is integrator responsibility
